overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring the vibrant medieval town of Toussaint. The character walks up sunlit cobblestone streets through stone archways, enters a bustling town square with a large central tree, and passes through a vine-covered arcade.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street in stone village

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the cobblestone path through the quiet village outskirts

entered.detail: two-story stone building with red tile roof and wooden shutters
large stone archway forming a bridge overhead with greenery on top
curved cobblestone street winding uphill between stone walls
low stone wall with flower bushes on top

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a quiet village street with stone houses and red tile roofs. The path curves uphill toward a large stone archway bridge in the distance, with lush green bushes and flowers lining the cobblestone street.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone gate transition into upper town

events.description: passing through large stone archway into sunlit upper town area
emerging from shadow of archway into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the main town gate, moving from shadow into bright sunlight

notable_agents.action: town guard standing watch near the gate entrance

entered.detail: impressive stone gate with red and white columns and crenellated top
vibrant orange and red plastered building with arched windows
massive leafy tree dominating the town square ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the main town gate, passing from the narrow village street into a bright sunlit plaza. A guard stands watch as Geralt emerges from the stone archway, revealing the colorful townhouses and massive central tree of the main square ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with central tree and grand stairs

events.description: ascending wide stone stairs in the town square

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand stone stairs in the town square, passing by townspeople

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking across the square

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with ornate balustrades leading to upper level
large stone planter with flowers surrounding the base of the tree
bright blue building with red shutters and flower boxes

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores the bustling town square, ascending the grand stone stairs beneath the massive central tree. Colorful buildings in vibrant blues, oranges, and reds surround the plaza, with townspeople walking about and festive banners hanging overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered vine arcade with inn entrance

events.description: entering shaded walkway covered by vine pergola

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded arcade, passing under the vine canopy

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress standing near wooden barrels

entered.detail: wooden pergola overhead covered with dense green vines creating dappled shade
hanging sign with red lettering marking the inn entrance
stacked wooden barrels and outdoor seating along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shaded walkway covered by a dense vine pergola, creating a cool, dappled light environment. Wooden barrels and an inn sign mark this as a commercial area, with the vibrant colors of the town still visible through the leafy canopy overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet village street into the vibrant, sun-drenched heart of a bustling medieval town. It begins by following Geralt along a curving cobblestone path lined with red-tiled houses and lush greenery, moving steadily toward a distant stone archway. As the character passes through the gate, the narrow street opens into a bright, expansive plaza where a guard stands watch and a massive central tree dominates the horizon. The scene then expands into the lively town square, ascending grand stone stairs amidst colorful buildings and festive banners before shifting toward a shaded commercial area. Finally, the camera glides under a dense vine pergola, transitioning from the open sunlight into a cool, dappled environment marked by wooden barrels and inn signs.
